metaDescription: Every slot machine from Used Slot Shop includes a 1-year home-use warranty and free lifetime phone/video tech support. Full coverage details.
title: Every machine is covered for a full year.
subtitle: Plus free lifetime tech support from the people who refurbished it.

sections.heading: What's covered (12 months from delivery)
bullets: Main boards, RAM, and CPU modules
LCD and CRT displays (failures, not impact damage)

sections.heading: What's not covered
bullets: Light bulbs and light bulb starters
Glass, LCD, or bezel breakage from impact or drop
Damage from power surges (use a surge protector)

sections.heading: How the warranty works
paragraphs: If something fails in the first 12 months, call our service line or email our service email (both are in Site Settings). A technician will diagnose over the phone or video. If it's a covered part, we ship the replacement at no cost to you. You are responsible for return shipping of the defective component.

sections.heading: Return policy
paragraphs: We accept returns within 14 days of delivery on machines that are in original condition. The buyer is responsible for return freight. A 15% restocking fee applies to all non-defective returns. If your machine arrived damaged in transit, call us immediately (within 48 hours) and we'll handle the freight claim and replacement on our end.

sections.heading: Free lifetime tech support
paragraphs: The warranty period is 12 months. Phone and video tech support is forever. Even a decade from now, if you can't figure out why your hopper isn't feeding or your bill validator stopped reading $20s, call us. Parts availability is never guaranteed for legacy platforms, but advice always is.
